mano_cua.result_summary: 链接锚文本编辑功能正常。在Toolbar>Basics story中测试（editor--demo story不存在）。创建链接'Click here'→https://example.com成功。点击链接后出现浮层显示URL和编辑/复制/取消链接图标。点击编辑图标打开对话框，包含URL/Anchor text/Link title三个字段。将Anchor text从'Click here'修改为'Demo Page'并保存后，编辑器中链接显示文本正确更新为'Demo Page'，URL保持https://example.com不变，两个字段互不影响
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Link anchor text editing works correctly. Created link 'Click here' with URL https://example.com. After clicking edit icon in link tooltip, modified Anchor text to 'Demo Page' and saved. Editor shows 'Demo Page' as link text while URL remains https://example.com. URL and anchor text fields are independent.
